File: backend/pom.xml

- Parent: org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-parent:3.3.0
- java.version property: 17
- No explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration found in POM (uses parent-managed plugin)
- Direct dependencies:
  - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-web
  - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-validation
  - org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test (test scope)

Notes:
- Spring Boot 3.3.0 supports Java 17+ (Java 17 and Java 21 are generally supported). Bumping the Java runtime to Java 21 is likely compatible with this SB version, but the user must pick the target LTS.
- No obvious legacy `javax.*` artifacts are declared in dependencies; javax→jakarta migration not required here.
- If target Java >17 is chosen, verify build plugins (compiler, surefire) and any CI/docker images; update `java.version` property accordingly.
